# Md Shafaat Ali Choyon

> Growth, marketing and public-health strategist with 16+ years turning complex systems into measurable results across healthcare, fintech, e-commerce and consumer tech. MBA · MCIM · MPH · CHES®. Based in Redford, Michigan, USA.

## About

Md Shafaat Ali Choyon (also written Shafaat Choyon) is a strategist who works at the intersection of growth marketing, health communication, digital-health product, and population health. He is Master of Public Health (Health Education & Promotion) and CHES®-credentialed, holds an MBA, and is a Member of the Chartered Institute of Marketing (MCIM). His portfolio is framed through four lenses — Growth & Marketing, Health Communication, Health-Tech Product, and Population Health — each presenting the same body of work for a different audience.

## Areas of expertise

- Growth marketing and brand strategy
- Health communication and behavior-change campaigns
- Public health, health literacy, and health policy
- Digital-health products and platform adoption
- Multi-channel campaigns and product marketing

## Selected experience

- Praava Health — growth, corporate-sales engine, and service-line growth
- Samsung, Asiatic (JWT), Grey/WPP, MGH, Grameenphone, SureCash, Ekhanei — marketing, brand, and campaign leadership across consumer tech, advertising, fintech and e-commerce
- Eastern Michigan University — health-promotion and public-health work; MPH

## Published writing

13+ published health-policy and digital-health articles in outlets including The Eastern Echo, The Daily Star, Dhaka Tribune, IBT, and The Financial Express. Topics include the public-health workforce, health communication, health literacy, medical debt, public-health investment, misinformation, and digital health and the economy.
